q: [JA] What does 有効応力 σ' represent in 土質力学?
opts: Total stress minus pore water pressure
Total stress plus pore water pressure
explain: [JA] 有効応力 = σ - u (テルツァーギ 1925). It is the 応力 carried by the soil skeleton, controlling ALL mechanical behavior: せん断強さ, 圧密 rate, and 液状化 resistance.

q: [JA] What is the モール・クーロン failure criterion for drained conditions?
explain: [JA] Drained: τf = c' + σ'tanφ'. Both c' (粘着力) and φ' (摩擦角) are 有効応力 parameters from CD triaxial or drained direct shear tests. Undrained: τf = cu (φu=0).

q: [JA] In テルツァーギ's 圧密 theory, what does Tv = 0.848 correspond to?
explain: [JA] Time factors: Tv=0.197 → U=50%. Tv=0.848 → U=90%. Tv=1.781 → U=99%. The formula: Tv = cv·t/H² where H is the drainage path length. Double drainage: H = half layer thickness.

q: [JA] 液状化 is most likely to occur in which soil type?
explain: [JA] 液状化 requires: (1) 粘着力less soil (砂/シルト), (2) saturated (below water table), (3) loose state (low Dr or low N), (4) cyclic loading (地震). FL = CRR/CSR < 1.0 → liquefied.

q: [JA] What is the typical 摩擦角 φ' for loose to medium dense clean 砂?
explain: [JA] 砂: φ' = 28-32° (loose, rounded), 32-38° (medium dense), 38-45° (dense, angular). 粘土: φ' = 20-30°. φ' depends on particle shape, size distribution, and state of compaction. From triaxial CD tests.

q: [JA] What happens to 有効応力 during undrained loading of saturated 粘土?
opts: [JA] Excess pore pressure develops, 有効応力 doesn't change much short-term
explain: [JA] In undrained loading, volume change is prevented. Excess pore pressure develops to carry the applied load. 全応力 increases but σ' changes little initially. Over time (圧密), u dissipates and σ' increases.

q: [JA] The compression index Cc is used for calculating:
explain: [JA] Sc = Cc·H·log(σ'f/σ'0)/(1+e0). Cc from oedometer test (slope of e vs log σ' curve in virgin compression). Cs = swelling/recompression index (used for OCR > 1). Typically Cc ≈ 0.009(LL-10) for remolded 粘土s.

q: [JA] What does OCR > 1 indicate?
explain: [JA] OCR = σ'pc/σ'v0. OCR = 1: normally consolidated (NC). OCR > 1: overconsolidated (OC) — soil was previously under higher 応力 (e.g., erosion, past ice load). OC soils are denser and stronger than NC at same σ'v0.

q: [JA] What is Darcy's Law for flow through soil?
explain: [JA] v = k·i where v = seepage velocity (m/s), k = hydraulic conductivity (m/s), i = hydraulic gradient (dimensionless). Q = k·i·A. 粘土: k ≈ 10⁻⁸-10⁻¹⁰ m/s. 砂: k ≈ 10⁻³-10⁻⁵ m/s.

q: [JA] What is the general 支持力 equation (テルツァーギ)?
explain: [JA] テルツァーギ (1943): qu = cNc + qNq + 0.5γBNγ. Nc, Nq, Nγ depend on φ'. For φ'=30°: Nc=30.1, Nq=18.4, Nγ=15.7. Allowable: qa = qu/FS. FS = 3 for static loads. Shape factors applied for non-strip footings.

q: [JA] What is the formula for P波 velocity?
explain: [JA] Vp = √(M/ρ) where M = conひずみed 弾性係数 = K + 4G/3 = λ + 2G. Always Vp > Vs. In saturated soil, K ≫ G so Vp is dominated by bulk stiffness (~1500 m/s like water). Vs is unaffected by saturation (G same).

q: [JA] Why can't S波s travel through water or liquefied soil?
explain: [JA] S波s require shear stiffness G. Fluids (water, liquefied soil) have G = 0 — they cannot resist shear. Therefore Vs = √(G/ρ) = 0 in fluids. This is why S波s don't travel through water and why Vs indicates 液状化.

q: [JA] What is Vs30 and what is it used for?
opts: [JA] Average S波 velocity in top 30m for site classification
explain: [JA] Vs30 = 30/Σ(hi/Vsi) = time-average Vs for top 30m. Used for seismic site classification worldwide. Japan: 告示1457号. NEHRP classes: A(>1500), B(760-1500), C(360-760), D(180-360), E(<180) m/s.

q: [JA] Snell's Law for 屈折法 is expressed as:
explain: [JA] sin(θ)/V = constant (ray parameter). At critical angle ic: sin(ic) = V₁/V₂. Head wave travels along interface at V₂. Travel time: t = x/V₁ + 2h·cos(ic)/V₁. Crossover distance: xc = 2h√((V₂-V₁)/(V₂+V₁)).

q: [JA] In a PS検層 survey, which is measured?
opts: Both Vp and Vs vs depth in a borehole
explain: [JA] PS検層 (PS検層, JGS 3511) measures BOTH Vp and Vs at depth intervals in a ボーリング孔. Surface source (sledgehammer), 3-component downhole receiver. Output: Vp(z), Vs(z) → Vs30, G0, E0, ν.

q: [JA] The small-ひずみ shear 弾性係数 G0 from Vs is:
explain: [JA] G0 = ρ·Vs² where ρ = mass 密度 (kg/m³), Vs = shear wave velocity (m/s). G0 in Pa. Example: ρ=1800 kg/m³, Vs=200 m/s → G0 = 1800×200² = 72 MPa. G0 = small-ひずみ (dynamic) 弾性係数, larger than static G.

q: [JA] Rayleigh wave velocity VR in homogeneous material is approximately:
explain: [JA] VR ≈ 0.92·Vs for ν=0.25. Retrograde elliptical particle motion. In layered media, VR is dispersive (different frequency = different depth = different Vs). 表面波探査 exploits this dispersion to build Vs profiles.

q: [JA] 屈折法 CANNOT detect which condition?
opts: [JA] Velocity inversion (low-speed layer under high-speed layer)
explain: [JA] 屈折法 requires velocity increasing with depth (V₂>V₁). A velocity inversion (low-speed layer beneath high-speed layer) creates a 'hidden layer' — the refraction method cannot detect it. Use reflection or tomography instead.

q: [JA] What is the typical Vs of soft 粘土?
explain: [JA] Soft 粘土: Vs = 50-150 m/s (very soft). Dense 砂: 200-400. Soft 岩: 400-700. Hard 岩: >1000. Tokyo bay area soft alluvial 粘土s often have Vs < 100 m/s → site class D → high amplification.

q: [JA] The H/V spectral ratio peak frequency in microtremor surveys corresponds to:
explain: [JA] H/V (Nakamura method 1989): H/V peak = f0 = site fundamental frequency (T0 = 1/f0). Related to average Vs and depth H: f0 ≈ Vs/4H. High H/V amplitude at f0 → strong site amplification expected.

q: [JA] In 標準貫入試験, what does the N値 represent?
opts: Number of blows per 300mm to drive the sampler
explain: [JA] N = number of blows to drive split-spoon sampler 300 mm (after 150 mm seating drive). Hammer: 63.5 kg, drop 760 mm. JIS A 1219. N60 = N×(ER/60) corrects for energy ratio. Japanese auto hammer: ER ≈ 72%.

q: [JA] The overburden correction factor CN for 標準貫入試験 is applied to:
explain: [JA] CN corrects N60 to reference pressure (100 kPa). CN = √(Pa/σ'v0). (N1)60 = CN×N60. Deep samples appear lower N due to confinement. Correction brings all values to same confining 応力 for comparison.

q: [JA] In コーン貫入試験u, what does Ic represent?
explain: [JA] Ic = √((3.47-logQt)²+(1.22+logFr)²) — Soil Behavior Type Index (Robertson 1990). Ic < 1.31: 礫s. 1.31-2.05: clean 砂s. 2.05-2.60: シルトy 砂s. 2.60-2.95: 砂y シルトs. 2.95-3.60: シルトy 粘土s. >3.60: 粘土s.

q: [JA] Wenner array apparent 比抵抗 formula is:
explain: [JA] Wenner: ρa = 2πa·(V/I) where a = electrode spacing, V = voltage between MN, I = injected current. K = 2πa (geometric factor). Larger a → deeper penetration (approximately 0.5a). Good for horizontal mapping.

q: [JA] PS検層 JGS 3511 measures:
opts: Dynamic P and S wave velocities in borehole
explain: [JA] PS検層 (JGS 3511): 3-component geophone moved down ボーリング孔 in 1m steps. Surface hammer source on plank (P) or horizontal (S). First-arrival picks → interval Vp and Vs. Used for Vs30, G0=ρVs², seismic design.

q: [JA] The FL method for 液状化 assessment uses:
explain: [JA] FL = CRR/CSR (道路橋示方書, Japanese Road Bridge Specification). FL < 1.0: liquefiable. FL = 1.0-1.5: marginal. FL > 1.5: safe. CRR from (N1)60cs or Vs. CSR = 0.65×(σv/σ'v)×(amax/g)×rd.

q: [JA] What is the critical angle in 屈折法?
explain: [JA] ic = arcsin(V₁/V₂). At this angle of incidence, the refracted ray travels along the interface. Below ic: reflection occurs. At ic: head wave forms. Refraction works only when V₂ > V₁ (otherwise no ic exists).

q: [JA] What does a ボアホールカメラ (孔内カメラ) primarily reveal that a core log alone cannot?
opts: [JA] 3D fracture orientation, aperture, and 地下水 inflow locations
explain: [JA] ボアホールカメラs provide visual images of fracture orientation (dip/strike), aperture (crack width), infill material, weathering grade, and exact depth of 地下水 inflow. Core samples lose orientation information during retrieval — the camera sees these features in place.

q: [JA] In a プレッシャーメーター test, what does the limit pressure PL represent?
opts: [JA] The lateral ground failure pressure (ultimate resistance)
explain: [JA] PL = limit pressure is the asymptotic pressure at which the soil/岩 fails laterally during プレッシャーメーター inflation. It is analogous to 支持力 in the horizontal direction. PL ≈ 5.5×cu for soft 粘土. Used for pile lateral capacity and foundation design.

q: [JA] What is the K30 value in a 平板載荷試験 and what is the Japanese road base specification?
opts: [JA] K30 is depth of test; spec ≥ 150 MN/m³
[JA] K30 = 沈下 at 300 kPa; spec ≥ 10 mm
[JA] K30 = pressure/沈下 at 1.25mm; Japanese road base spec ≥ 110 MN/m³
explain: [JA] K30 = subgrade reaction coefficient from 平板載荷試験. K30 = load at 1.25mm 沈下 / 1.25mm, using a 300mm diameter rigid plate. Japanese road design specification (道路橋示方書): K30 ≥ 110 MN/m³ for road base layer. Higher K30 = stiffer subgrade.

q: [JA] 岩盤品質指標 = 55% on a core log is classified as:
explain: [JA] 岩盤品質指標 classification: 90-100% = Excellent (優良), 75-90% = Good (良), 50-75% = Fair (普通), 25-50% = Poor (不良), <25% = Very Poor (極めて不良). 岩盤品質指標 = 55% falls in FAIR (50-75%). Tunnel support: steel sets + shotcrete likely needed. RMR will reflect this classification.

q: [JA] Ground Penetrating Radar (地中レーダー) works BEST in which ground condition?
explain: [JA] 地中レーダー signal is attenuated by high electrical conductivity. Saltwater, wet 粘土, and conductive soils absorb the EM energy — depth penetration drops to 0.5-1m. Dry 砂, 礫, and dry 岩 are ideal (low conductivity) — depth up to 10-30m possible. Always check soil conductivity before deploying 地中レーダー.

q: [JA] In 地中レーダー, the depth formula d = v·t/2 uses two-way travel time because:
opts: The radar travels at double speed underground
[JA] The pulse travels DOWN to the reflector and BACK UP — hence ÷2 for one-way depth
The antenna moves twice per scan
explain: [JA] The radar pulse travels from surface antenna DOWN to the reflector, then reflects UP back to the same antenna. The recorded time t is two-way travel time (TWTT). Depth = (wave velocity × TWTT) / 2. Velocity v = c/√εr where εr is the soil dielectric constant.

q: [JA] Which investigation method is the ONLY standard way to directly measure the lateral stiffness (horizontal deformation 弾性係数) of soil or soft 岩?
opts: [JA] プレッシャーメーター test (孔内水平載荷試験)
explain: [JA] The プレッシャーメーター test (Ménard) is the ONLY standard in-situ test that directly measures horizontal 応力-ひずみ behavior. It inflates a cylindrical probe against the ボーリング孔 wall and records pressure vs. volume change. Em (プレッシャーメーター 弾性係数) is used directly in Ménard's 沈下 formula for laterally loaded piles and flexible foundations.

q: [JA] What is the key difference between 岩盤品質指標 and TCR (Total Core Recovery)?
opts: [JA] 岩盤品質指標 counts pieces ≥100mm only (natural breaks); TCR counts ALL recovered core
[JA] TCR is for soft soil; 岩盤品質指標 is for hard 岩
[JA] 岩盤品質指標 is measured in % while TCR is in mm
explain: [JA] 岩盤品質指標 = (Σ intact pieces ≥ 100mm natural breaks) / L × 100%. TCR = all recovered core / L × 100%. TCR ≥ 岩盤品質指標 always. A core with many short pieces (all <100mm) could have TCR=100% but 岩盤品質指標=0%. Only natural fractures are counted for 岩盤品質指標 — mechanical drill breaks are excluded.
